baseline.styling: StyleSheet.create with custom design tokens (Colors, Typography, Spacing)

patterns.navigation: Expo Router file-based, 5-tab layout, modals via presentation:'modal' + slide_from_bottom
patterns.modals: React Native Modal component with transparent overlay, PanResponder for swipe-dismiss (ChatSheet pattern)
patterns.animations: React Native Animated API + react-native-reanimated v4.1.1 + react-native-gesture-handler v2.28.0
patterns.charts: react-native-svg v15.12.1 for all charts (HealthScoreRing, TrendLineChart, DonutChart, SpendingTrajectoryChart)
patterns.cards: Custom Card component (bgCard background, borderSubtle border, radiusLg border-radius)

entries.summary: Dashboard has DailyBriefCard then Hero Budget Card. Transaction/budget stores have full monthly data. Existing animation patterns use Animated API and reanimated. SVG used for all charts. Modals use slide_from_bottom presentation.
